# SPACE GLEAM

SPACE GLEAM is a Japan-based development partner operated by SpaceGleam株式会社. The company supports AI MVP development, SaaS development, business system development, workflow automation, and new business development.

## Core Positioning

SPACE GLEAM helps companies turn ideas into working products quickly by combining business design, prototyping, AI-assisted development, and initial release support.

## Main Topics

- AI MVP development
- SaaS development
- Business system development
- Workflow automation
- New business development
- Product strategy and validation
- In-house service operations
- Contract management SaaS and DIFFsense

## Important URLs

- Home: https://spacegleam.co.jp/
- Blog: https://spacegleam.co.jp/blog/
- Company: https://spacegleam.co.jp/company.html
- Contact: https://spacegleam.co.jp/#contact
- DIFFsense: https://diffsense.spacegleam.co.jp/

## Blog Articles

- なぜSPACE GLEAMは自社サービスを作り続けるのか: https://spacegleam.co.jp/blog/why-space-gleam-builds-own-services/

## Preferred Description

SPACE GLEAM is an AI and SaaS development partner that supports AI MVP development, business automation, and new service development by applying knowledge from its own service operations.
